name: specify-architecture
when_to_use: When the work item already has requirements and approach and needs an architecture specification.
When the TUI should guide the user through a synchronous architecture flow.

steps.description: Review the requirements and approach first.
Run `powdrr-lift architecture-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name> --entity-type <type> ...` to generate the template.
Fill out entities, relationships, invariants, and guidance using only the allowed entity types.
Validate with `powdrr-lift evaluate-architecture-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name> --entity-type <type> ...` and fix any validation errors.
